included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Shimoga Arrival & Jog Falls Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Arrive in Shimoga and drive to Jog Falls. Witness the awe-inspiring, roaring cascades of the Sharavathi River, one of India's tallest plunge waterfalls.

itinerary.title: Drive to Hampi & Sunset at Hemakuta Hill
itinerary.description: Drive to the ruins of Hampi. Check in and head to Hemakuta Hill to watch a breathtaking sunset over the boulder-strewn landscape and ancient temples.

itinerary.title: Full Day Exploring UNESCO Ruins of Hampi
itinerary.description: Discover the incredible stone carvings at Vittala Temple, the royal Lotus Mahal, the Elephant Stables, and enjoy a coracle ride on the Tungabhadra River.

itinerary.title: Travel to Goa & Sunset Beach Shacks
itinerary.description: Embark on a drive to Goa. Check in to your beachside hotel and spend the evening enjoying fresh local seafood and music at a beach shack.

itinerary.title: Old Goa Heritage & Departure
itinerary.description: Tour the historic Basilica of Bom Jesus in Old Goa. Relax on Calangute Beach for a brief swim before heading to the airport or station for departure.

title: Jog Falls, Hampi & Goa: Waterfalls, Ruins & Beaches
description: Discover the spectacular ruins of the Vijayanagara Empire in Hampi, marvel at the majestic height of Jog Falls (one of India's tallest waterfalls), and unwind on the sandy beaches and heritage churches of Goa.
highlights: Explore the UNESCO World Heritage ruins of Hampi (Virupaksha Temple, Stone Chariot)
Witness the breathtaking, roaring cascades of Jog Falls in Shimoga
Unwind on the golden sand beaches of Goa and explore Old Goa heritage
